scenarios.denial_description: Workers Compensation denied the claim with CO-4: Procedure code inconsistent with modifier. This denial falls under the coding category and requires specific resolution steps to achieve successful resubmission.
resolution_steps: Review the procedure code and modifier combination on the claim
Verify modifier usage against payer-specific coding guidelines
Check NCCI edits for modifier requirements
Correct the modifier or procedure code as needed
Resubmit with corrected coding and supporting documentation

scenarios.denial_description: Tricare denied the claim with CO-18: Duplicate claim/service. This denial falls under the duplicate category and requires specific resolution steps to achieve successful resubmission.
resolution_steps: Search for the original claim in the payer system
Verify if the original claim was paid, denied, or pending
If original was denied, resolve the original denial first
If duplicate submission, void the duplicate claim
If resubmission needed, use appropriate claim frequency code
